name: Tara Devi
title: What truly makes my heart feel alive is art
summary: As a young creative with over five years of experience, I’ve naturally grown into a multidisciplinary storyteller working across art direction, visuals, films, and campaigns, mostly within retail and e-commerce. My journey began in Assam, where I was born and raised, eventually leading me to study Mass Communication and Video Production at St. Anthony’s, Shillong. Since childhood, I have been deeply drawn to photography, film, and creative fashion—realms that allow me to live in a different world. Along the way, I’ve worn many creative hats—from Creative Director to Designer and Advertising Specialist—working with brands like Myntra and Citykart. These experiences have shaped my intuitive, hands-on way of working. I’m drawn to creating work that not only makes me proud but also sparks that “wow” feeling in others.
aboutTitle: Creative Strategy Architect | Visual Strategy & Production Lead | Creative Innovation Producer | Brand Storytelling Strategist
aboutMe: Creative professional with strong art direction and a versatile creative skill set across advertising, films, photography, and integrated campaign execution. With over 5 years of experience in a retail and ecommerce industry. I have worked across multiple creative roles, including Creative Director, Creative Designer, and Advertising Specialist. I bring a sharp eye for visual storytelling and a hands-on approach to conceptualizing and executing creative campaigns and films, delivering cohesive brand narratives across platforms.

experience.description: Drove high-impact creative strategy at the intersection of art direction, visual production, and marketing, leveraging AI-enabled workflows to elevate brand storytelling and deliver compelling, commercially aligned imagery at scale.

Spearheaded large-scale, multi-format digital campaigns from concept to execution—blending cutting-edge CGI, Gen Z–led creative strategy, and precision production leadership to deliver high-impact storytelling and tens of millions in audience reach.

expertise.title: AI-Driven Creative Production
expertise.description: Designed and integrated AI-powered visual workflows to streamline fashion shoot production while elevating quality and consistency.

expertise.title: Fashion Visual Strategy & Art Direction
expertise.description: Shaped and evolved brand visual identity through innovative concepts that create a cohesive customer experience.

expertise.title: Campaign & Content Production Leadership
expertise.description: Led end-to-end production of high-impact digital campaigns, commercials, and content at scale with on-time delivery.

expertise.title: Gen Z–Led Creative Strategy
expertise.description: Developed trend-forward creative direction and photoshoot concepts aligned with youth culture and emerging fashion aesthetics.

expertise.title: CGI/VFX-Integrated Storytelling
expertise.description: Bridged fashion, technology, and marketing by collaborating with CGI/VFX teams to bring concepts to life.

expertise.title: Creative Operations & Quality Governance
expertise.description: Established art direction decks, approval standards, and quality frameworks to enhance clarity, efficiency, and brand consistency.
